cells.v: ½ Natural Recovery Healing Time (except Magic Recovery)
+10 critical damage & No damage caps to 1 type of creature/race. May only be taken on 1st level unless GM/story grants.
Once per day +10 to OB & DB after shouting Battle Cry for 1 combat. Must spent 2 turns to perform. While shouting ½ BMR walk only.
-30 Perception modifier during Combat (as free action) instead of -50
Extra 10d to initiative roll. Cannot be taken together with Lightning Reflexes. If so cancel previous.
+20 to all Command rolls. Successful roll can grant allies a +10 to OB & DD until they get hit
Spent a Fate Point to get important insight on main objective.
+10 to Communication reactive and Communication structured categories,  and +15 to appearance (max 105). May only be taken on 1st Level.
When fighting to protect his village  +10 to parry and OB; +10 to RR Will against when related.
you can teach your skills at half the learning rate to other players
+15 to any maneuver where verbally attempts to calm or persuade. (singing, public speaking, duping, trade, acting, etc.). May only be taken at 1st level.
x2 normal range for all thrown weapons.
All Brawling attacks are resolved on the Crush Critical Table rather than the Martial Arts Strikes Critical Table.
All negative bonuses to the characters actions gained through critical strikes are ½
+10 to DB for all attacks. If aware of an incoming attack, may apply extra +10 to DB.
+10 to all skill where he interacts with other people (duping, trading, seduction, diplomacy). The other person must be close enough to be looked directly by him.
High open ended roll range is 95-100.
High open ended roll range is 94-100.
High open ended roll range is 93-100.

your fumbles for lore skills are reduced to 01-02, you gain 20 skill ranks to give to Science Analytic, Socio Economics and Social Sciences skills . Additionally, you gain a +10 on the selected skills.
you may wield a two handed weapon with one hand, encumbrance penalties are halved, you have a -20 to fighting in close spaces
Intuition 80, Treat wounds 20R, Treat Ailment 20R, Diagnose 10R
you gain a +20 to Medicine category, also, all fate points spent in healing maneuvers grant an 80 instead of a 50
The character’s body can mask the scent of any odor within 1.5m, wouldn't even leave an odor for any animals to find. May only be taken at 1st level.
Any 15 minutes or more studies will be placed into his memory. This also grants a +10 to all Science Analytic, Socio Economics and Social Sciences categories
Ability to negate permanent damage from all but fatal wounds. Recovery rate for non-fatal injuries is ½.
Any bleeding wounds (wounds giving hits per round) that the character receives have their rates ½ (round down).
+10 bonus to all Resistance Rolls. Cannot be taken withother tlents that affect Resistance
+20 bonus to all Resistance Rolls. Cannot be taken withother tlents that affect Resistance
+10 bonus on all his subterfuge active skills.
½ range increment penalties (from -10 to -5). May be taken multiple times, once for misile and one for thrown
Allow to take 150% hits loss before falling unconscious. Does not modified death limit hit points.
you gain a +20 to your communication reactive skills when you are not beign honest
fate points spent on combat actions give +80 instead of the usual +50.
+10 a RR Will específicamente contra la tentación de artefactos. No aplica a otras tiradas de RR Will.
+20 a RR Will específicamente contra la tentación de artefactos. No aplica a otras tiradas de RR Will.
Una vez por sesión, reduce a la mitad los puntos de Caos generados por un único uso de artefacto antes de tirar los dados. Debe decidirse antes de tirar.
Siente la Potencia aproximada de un artefacto sosteniéndolo, sin tirada de Attunement. Solo revela la Potencia, no el efecto ni el riesgo exacto.
+20 al skill Attunement en todos sus usos. Al identificar un artefacto, obtiene además una imagen o sensación del último usuario, sin coste adicional de Caos.
Puede estimar el nivel de Caos acumulado de otra persona con un minuto de observación y una tirada de Perception Active. Falla si la marca está deliberadamente oculta.
History Background (villa de frontera o sin villa)
+15 a Outdoors Natural y Survival. Ignora el primer penalizador de movimiento en selva agreste. Solo disponible en creación de personaje.
El umbral de Caos en cada nivel se desplaza +100 puntos (Marcado en 301, Corrupto en 601, etc.). No reduce el Caos acumulado, solo retrasa los efectos de umbral.
Con éxito excepcional (supera 146) al usar un artefacto, el rango mínimo para anular un dado de Caos se reduce en 10 puntos.
History Background específico, Self Discipline 90. Zhar solamente.
Una vez por sesión puede intentar una tirada de Insight para percibir contacto con energía del Orden en un lugar, objeto o persona. El GM decide qué revela. No otorga poderes activos.
Puede ceder a un dado de tentación adicional (total 3 en vez de 2) sin tirada extra. El tercer dado sigue siendo de tentación (2/6 de C). Tolerancia física inusual sin conexión innata.
Fishing 15R, Intuition 70. Villas del lago únicamente.

Décadas de pesca en el lago caótico otorgan una lectura casi sobrenatural del agua. +20 a Fishing y a Outdoors Natural en entorno lacustre. Una vez por sesión puede intentar una tirada de Intuition para detectar si hay criaturas activas bajo la superficie antes de que sean visibles.

El personaje puede operar en el lago durante jornadas extremas sin penalizadores de fatiga por exposición al agua. Adicionalmente, tiene un +15 a cualquier tirada de resistencia contra efectos menores del agua caótica (sabor metálico, irritación, leve corrupción por contacto prolongado).

El personaje ha estudiado los patrones de movimiento y sonido de las criaturas del Caos con tal profundidad que puede imitarlos de forma convincente. Criaturas menores del Caos tienen un 50% de no identificarlo como amenaza inmediata. Criaturas mayores requieren una tirada exitosa de Mimicry opuesta a su Perception. Solo funciona en exteriores.

En selva agreste, el personaje se mueve sin dejar rastro detectable. Criaturas del Caos con Tracking tienen un −30 para seguirlo. En exteriores y en movimiento, +30 a Stalking/Hiding. En interiores o sin vegetación densa, el bonus se reduce a +10.
Attunement 20R, Technical/Trained 15R. History Background (Litor o Ydral preferido)

El personaje puede realizar mantenimiento básico de pylons en el campo, extendiendo su vida útil o estabilizando uno en fallo inminente. Una vez por arco narrativo puede intentar una tirada de Attunement (dificultad alta) para reactivar un pylon menor temporalmente. Fallo catastrófico puede acelerar el colapso.
Animal Handling 15R, Outdoors Natural 15R. Poymel preferido.

Especialista en el manejo de animales corrompidos. +25 a Animal Handling con bestias parcialmente caóticas. Los animales corrompidos bajo su cuidado generan un 20% menos de Caos ambiental. Puede intentar calmar a una criatura corrompida menor con una tirada de Animal Handling en vez de combate.

El personaje lleva un mapa mental detallado de zonas peligrosas de la selva. +20 a Navigation y Specific Region en el exterior. Una vez por sesión puede recordar una ruta alternativa o un punto de referencia que los demás no conocen. El GM puede usar este talento para revelar información de lore sobre zonas inexploradas.
+10 to Skills Climbing, Jumping, Acrobatics, Swimming
+5' (1.5 m.) to BMR. May only be taken on 1st level
+10 to skills seduction, trade, public speaking and convince
This is the ability of the character to manage to properly rest while wearing Soft Leather armor without any penalties
This is the ability of the character to manage to properly rest while wearing Rigid Leather armor without any penalties
This is the ability of the character to manage to properly rest while wearing Chainmail armor without any penalties
+10 to Perception active and passive rolls.
+10 to Stalking & Hiding, contorsions and Acrobatics skills
Once per gaming session you may re-roll any dice you rolled. You may buy this talent many times.
+5 to cooking, foraging, herbcraft and poison lore.
Successful resistance stamina bonus maneuver uses the granted bonus to negate the penalties for low hit points.
successful perception maneuver can let you know exactly the elapsed time.
+20 on stamina rolls to resist stunning. Stunned maneuvering penalties are reduced to -30 instead of -50.
+20 to lie perception maneuvers. Distance may hinder your percetion
You can make a perception passive roll at -50 to wake from sleep if an unknown danger approaches.
+5 to initiative roll. Cannot be taken together with Combat Reflexes. If so cancel previous.
High open ended roll range is 95-100 and low open ended roll range is 01-06.
High open ended roll range is 94-100 and low open ended roll range is 01-07.
High open ended roll range is 93-100 and low open ended roll range is 01-08.
High open ended roll range is 92-100 and low open ended roll range is 01-09.
+10 to sleight of hand & disarm locks and traps.
+10 bonus to all crafting skills and +35 to a particular one.
When Missile Deflection Combat Action is used +1 to DB for every 2 points put into the parry (instead of every 5 points).
+10 to armor skill, reduces the minimum armor penalty by 5
All penalties caused by low-light conditions or total darkness are ½.
-5 penalty for flanking attacks, -15 for rear attacks. However, appearance roll is determined on a 2d10, instead of 1d100. May only be taken at 1st level.
The character can one more extra slot without penalty
Weapon is drawn as a free action.
+10 bonus to all Stamina-based Resistance Rolls. Cannot be taken withother tlents that affect Resistance
+20 bonus to all Stamina-based Resistance Rolls. Cannot be taken withother tlents that affect Resistance
+10 bonus to all Will-based Resistance Rolls. Cannot be taken withother tlents that affect Resistance
+20 bonus to all Will-based Resistance Rolls. Cannot be taken withother tlents that affect Resistance
No penalties when performing actions on a Ship, even if passing through a storm.
Enables the Trained bonus on any shield
+10 bonus to a single skill. This Talent may be taken no more than three times, for a different skill each time. (free Addon)
May reload and fire every other round. This Talent may be taken multiple times for a different type of missile weapon each time.
Reload and fire time is ½ (round up). This Talent may be taken multiple times for a different type of missile weapon each time.
May reload and fire every other round. This Talent may be taken multiple times for a different type of missile weapon each time.
The character can read up to ten pages per minute.
Stunned rounds reduce by 1 round. If a strike results in only one round of stun, then it has no effect.
Resist weapon disarming with a +20 bonus, all his fumble ranges for melee weapons are reduced by 1. No fumble range can go below 1.
Allowed to hold his breath for 10 seconds plus 1 minute per Constitution bonus (minimum of 10 seconds).
+20 DB to full parry combat action, instead of +10.
75% time to put on armor. Allowed to develop swift dressing skill. Skill may lower dressing time to a minimum of 25%.
½ penalties for not sleeping or eating.
Character always knows where the north is. +20 to navigation
foes have a -40 penalty to track you on a certain type of terrain. Talent may be taken multiple times, one foe every type of terrain.
Character's main weapon reduces fumble range by -2, all other weapon by -1, to a minimum of 1.
Increase potential stat limit of stat under 61 by 1d10+5. Talent can be taken multiple times.
Increase potential stat limit of stat under 71 by 1d10+5 or stat under 81 by 1d6+4. Talent can be taken multiple times.
Increase potential stat limit of stat under 95 by 1d6+4. Talent can be taken up to 3 times.
Increase potential stat limit of stat above 92 by 1d6+4. Talent can be taken up to 3 times for Stats under 95 or up to 2 times for Stats 96 and above.
In one weapon group (ex. Short blades) you give one weapon a special +10 bonus, but a -15 to all the other weapons in that category.
+10 bonus to 4 adolescence skills, no weapon skill may be favored by this talent.
La villa de origen lo recibe siempre con predisposición positiva. Los NPCs de esa villa comienzan con actitud un paso más favorable. No aplica si el personaje tiene sufijo -nak o -khrav.
Puede identificar el sufijo de hito de cualquier persona que escuche presentarse, incluidas variantes regionales. +10 a tiradas sociales con un NPC cuyo sufijo reconoce correctamente.
+20 a identificar y predecir el comportamiento de una categoría de criaturas del Caos (elegida al tomar el talento). Puede tomarse múltiples veces para categorías distintas.
En exteriores, específicamente en selva o territorio salvaje, +20 a Stalking/Hiding. No aplica en interiores ni en villas.

Cuando activa un artefacto y sale un C en cualquier dado, puede hacer una tirada de Intuition (dificultad moderada). Si tiene éxito, recibe advertencia vaga del GM antes de aplicarse el −20 a la tirada de acción. No cancela el efecto.
Siente la presencia y estado aproximado de un pylon a menos de 500m sin tirada. A mayor distancia requiere una tirada de Attunement. Útil para orientación y para detectar pylons deteriorados.
Puede leer las marcas físicas del Caos en otras personas con observación directa, estimando su umbral aproximado (Limpio / Marcado / Corrupto). No da el número exacto.
Cuando cruza un umbral de Caos, puede hacer una tirada de RR Will a dificultad estándar. Si tiene éxito, el efecto de cruce se tira dos veces en la tabla 1d10 y el jugador elige cuál aplicar.

Puede extraer componentes funcionales de artefactos rotos. Una vez por artefacto destruido, tirada de Reasoning: éxito parcial recupera componentes menores; éxito total puede recuperar un fragmento de Potencia inferior. El GM determina qué es posible.
Los métodos de recuperación pasiva de Caos dan 1 punto adicional. Descanso completo pasa de −5 a −6; actividad moderada de −2 a −3. Pequeño pero acumulativo en arcos largos.
+15 a Outdoors Natural y Navigation exclusivamente en entorno lacustre. El personaje leer corrientes, temperatura y turbidez del agua caótica para predecir clima o movimiento de criaturas acuáticas.

+20 a Fishing con técnicas de red. En combate, puede usar una red de pesca como arma de inmovilización (tirada de Fishing opuesta a Agility del objetivo). Si tiene éxito, el objetivo queda enredado 1d6 rondas.

Puede imitar sonidos de fauna de la selva con precisión suficiente para engañar a criaturas menores del Caos. Como acción de un round, puede intentar desviar la atención de una criatura menor hacia un punto distante. Tirada de Mimicry opuesta a Perception de la criatura.

El personaje puede moverse y actuar produciendo exactamente los sonidos del entorno inmediato: viento, ramas, agua. −20 al rango de detección auditiva de cualquier criatura o persona intentando localizarlo. Requiere concentración: no funciona mientras corre.

+15 a Foraging en zonas caóticas o degradadas. El personaje sabe exactamente qué plantas, raíces o insectos son consumibles incluso con alteraciones del Caos. Una vez por día puede identificar un recurso útil en un entorno que otros descartarían como estéril.

Puede leer los patrones atmosféricos caóticos de la luna con anticipación mayor al resto. +20 a Weather. Una vez por sesión puede predecir con una tirada de Outdoors Natural si la actividad caótica ambiental aumentará o disminuirá en las próximas horas.

+15 a Ropemastery y Climbing en entornos de selva. El personaje puede construir puentes de cuerda, trampas de sujeción o sistemas de descenso funcionales con materiales naturales de la selva en la mitad del tiempo normal.

En situaciones de peligro inminente en exterior (emboscada de criaturas, trampa ambiental caótica), puede hacer una tirada libre de Intuition antes de que el GM revele la amenaza. Éxito da una advertencia vaga. No reemplaza Perception pasiva pero funciona aunque esté dormido o distraído.
La villa de origen lo recibe siempre con predisposición positiva. Los NPCs de esa villa comienzan con actitud un paso más favorable. No aplica si el personaje tiene sufijo -nak o -khrav.
Puede identificar el sufijo de hito de cualquier persona que escuche presentarse, incluidas variantes regionales. +10 a tiradas sociales con un NPC cuyo sufijo reconoce correctamente.
+20 a identificar y predecir el comportamiento de una categoría de criaturas del Caos (elegida al tomar el talento). Puede tomarse múltiples veces para categorías distintas.

Siente la presencia y estado aproximado de un pylon a menos de 500m sin tirada. A mayor distancia requiere una tirada de Attunement. Útil para orientación y para detectar pylons deteriorados.

+20 a Fishing con técnicas de red. En combate, puede usar una red de pesca como arma de inmovilización (tirada de Fishing opuesta a Agility del objetivo). Si tiene éxito, el objetivo queda enredado 1d6 rondas.

Puede imitar sonidos de fauna de la selva con precisión suficiente para engañar a criaturas menores del Caos. Como acción de un round, puede intentar desviar la atención de una criatura menor hacia un punto distante. Tirada de Mimicry opuesta a Perception de la criatura.

El personaje puede moverse y actuar produciendo exactamente los sonidos del entorno inmediato: viento, ramas, agua. −20 al rango de detección auditiva de cualquier criatura o persona intentando localizarlo. Requiere concentración: no funciona mientras corre.

+15 a Foraging en zonas caóticas o degradadas. El personaje sabe exactamente qué plantas, raíces o insectos son consumibles incluso con alteraciones del Caos. Una vez por día puede identificar un recurso útil en un entorno que otros descartarían como estéril.

Puede leer los patrones atmosféricos caóticos de la luna con anticipación mayor al resto. +20 a Weather. Una vez por sesión puede predecir con una tirada de Outdoors Natural si la actividad caótica ambiental aumentará o disminuirá en las próximas horas.

+15 a Ropemastery y Climbing en entornos de selva. El personaje puede construir puentes de cuerda, trampas de sujeción o sistemas de descenso funcionales con materiales naturales de la selva en la mitad del tiempo normal.

En situaciones de peligro inminente en exterior (emboscada de criaturas, trampa ambiental caótica), puede hacer una tirada libre de Intuition antes de que el GM revele la amenaza. Éxito da una advertencia vaga. No reemplaza Perception pasiva pero funciona aunque esté dormido o distraído.

You are addicted to a common substance (e.g., alcohol, pipe weed) whenever you don’t get your fix you must make a resistance will hard maneuver not to be at -5 to all your maneuvers for each day that passes.
You have reached at least middle age for your race. You must roll stat deterioration roll each year. You are older, probably wiser and a little slower.

You were born an albino; have pale-white hair & skin. Cannot blend into a crowd without disguise; have no resistance to sunburn, and thus must take many precautions against the sun. If under the sun without protection take 5 hits damage per hour until you find shelter.

You produce an aroma that drives a specified kind of animal insane. This cannot be mask, even by magical means. This animal will attack you ferociously. 50% chance a pack of them will hunt you down whenever you are in their territory. (                                                        )
You have no sense of smell, you cannot make perception rolls using this sense

Great tendency towards violence when dealing with stressful situations. If insulted, offended or under stress; must make a Resistance Will very hard maneuver not to loose your temper. Must react in a violent way, although not necessarily fatal. It takes you 5-50 turns to calm down
You have a -30 penalty to your battle perception

Death is your mojo in battle. Every encounter is to the death. You make sure they are dead even if they look like it. Don’t have to be a volatile person, however, if combat starts you go for the throat. Surrender is not an option, must make Resistance Will very hard maneuver to let one go. In intrigues, your opponents intrigue defense gains a +20
You tend to break stuff, all your breakage numbers for any weapon or equipment are increased by 2, and the strength throw of the weapon to determine breakage have a -20 modifier.
You cannot see colors, this is a minor problem, but it can bring trouble

You have a compulsive behavior that you must indulge as often as possible. You may choose it subject to the GM approval. You have to spent a lot of time on that behavior and a considerable amount of your income. It could be for example betting.
when in combat or intrigue you gain a -20 to all maneuvers unless you pass a difficult resistance will maneuver
You have lost some mobility because you are crippled in one leg. Your movement is reduced by half. You receive a -10 to all Ag maneuvers and a   -3 to your Qu bonus.
You are completely deaf. You operate at -100 to all actions that require hearing.
You cannot be awakened during your first hour of sleep, no matter what occurs around you. After the first hour you may awaken but you suffer a -25 to the perception maneuver to wake up

You deeply care about a person. This dependency may be used against you, and persuade you into doing something you normally wouldn't. This dependency requires you to protect him in any way. It is a single person, e.g. a child, someone you have been asked to guard “forever”, etc.
You are easy to hit when being sniped or ambushed, whoever attacks you like that gets a +25 to the maneuver and 5 extra ranks to add to the critical roll.
You believe in something above all. Whether it is a religion, a way of life, a realm or someone, you think it is worth dying for

You have a major fear for something, if you face it there is a 50% chance you will run away, and if you stay there is a 25% chance you will fall unconscious (common creature like, orc, women, dunledings. Etc)

You have a major fear for something, if you face it there is a 50% chance you will run away, and if you stay there is a 25% chance you will fall unconscious (rare fantastic creature like, warg, troll, ent)

You fear nothing; in fact, you consider planning o waiting to be cowardly. You would rather pull out your weapon and charge into the battle. Whenever in a battle situation you have to make a resist will +20 maneuver not to charge into combat
you cannot roll open ended in lore skills
Whenever you fumble a spell, missile or melee attack, or fall from a tree, you harm your friends. It could be that you make the attack against them or that you just make them fumble. GM discretion.
you always start an intrigue with intimidate, also atempts to taunt you have a +20 to critical rolls
You have a -20 to your hearing maneuvers
you have a -15 to all perception empathy related tests, if you intrigue against someone who is not behaving as you expect, your disposition against them is worsened by -1
you have -20 to all intrigue skills but composure
You tend to act first and think later. You almost never think your decisions through You should role-play this the same way, charging and almost never planning your actions

Have an irrational compulsion to steal whenever the opportunity arises. What you steal is irrelevant. To resist this behavior must make a Resistance Will very hard maneuver. You never return stole items, or discard them; but might sell or give them away them.
All your ranges for missile are halved
You cannot speak, any communication must be non-verbal. The player should not speak to the other players “off-character”.
opponents gain a +20 to deception attacks made against you and +10 to deception criticals
You are relatively ungraceful in your movements. You receive a penalty of -10 to all moving maneuvers
You are not quiet or subtle, you get a special penalty of -10 to all your skills in the subterfuge category, in addition you receive a -15 to the stalking and hiding skill
You have a hard time noticing things. You receive a penalty of -15 to your perception maneuvers
You have lost one of your eyes. Your fire missile weapons with a special penalty of -25
You have only one hand, you cannot fight with two weapons or use a shield, also climbing is almost impossible for you, so is putting on an armor
You have a low pain threshold. Every resistance stamina maneuver to resist stuns has a -20 penalty for you.
You believe that everyone wants to cause you harm. You may have one or two friends which you trust. You should truly role-play this

Have an irrational fear towards something. Whenever you confront it you must make a resistance Will hard maneuver not to become paralyzed with fear for the duration of the presence of that particular stimulus (crowd, water, sharp items)

Have an irrational fear towards something. Whenever you confront it you must make a resistance Will hard maneuver not to become paralyzed with fear for the duration of the presence of that particular stimulus (heights, closed spaces, etc)

Have an irrational fear towards something. Whenever you confront it you must make a resistance Will hard maneuver not to become paralyzed with fear for the duration of the presence of that particular stimulus (rare item, mechanical devices, number 13, etc)

You have poor eyesight, there is no way to correct it. You might be nearsighted OR farsighted. Nearsighted get -30 penalty to all melee attacks while Farsighted get -30 penalty to all missile attacks.
You have poor eyesight, you have to use glasses. You might be nearsighted OR farsighted. Nearsighted get -30 penalty to all melee attacks while Farsighted get -30 penalty to all missile attacks.

Feel entice towards fire; See it burn, smell it, feel the heat. Must set fires when possible; Occasionally feel the urge to set fires without reason; You need a Resistance Will hard maneuver to resist. Always try to contemplate any fire you come across and contemplate it. +50 to start fires.
Any time you see blood or gore it makes you uneasy. Each time you must do a resistance will hard maneuver or you will operate at -30 to all your actions.

You have a habit that is considered repulsive by the majority of society. You must perform this habit as often as possible. When people notice it they will regard you with disdain. (everyone in the room leaves it because of your habit, shitting in public, public masturbator, etc)

You have a habit that is considered repulsive by the majority of society. You must perform this habit as often as possible. When people notice it they will regard you with disdain. (people are disgusted by your habit, picking up your nose, etc)

You have a habit that is considered repulsive by the majority of society. You must perform this habit as often as possible. When people notice it they will regard you with disdain.(it annoys people but does not disgust them, bad breath, staring at breasts, etc)

You have a rival. Your relationship and history to this rival are up to you. He will do his best to outdo you, even hinder you. (The rival is a Leader of a village or top priest  and would do anything to humiliate you)
You have a rival. Your relationship and history to this rival are up to you. He will do his best to outdo you, even hinder you.  (this NPC won’t harm you, he respects you too much.)
You have a rival. Your relationship and history to this rival are up to you. He will do his best to outdo you, even hinder you. Flaw (This NPC would harm you if able and is of higher status)
You have a rival. Your relationship and history to this rival are up to you. He will do his best to outdo you, even hinder you. (This NPS would harm you if able. He is of your same status)

You enjoy causing pain, either mentally or physically. Whenever you can you must indulge your sadistic habits. You may conceal your weakness for a while but anyone that spends time with you will notice. People react negatively to a known sadistic. This probably makes you evil, huh?
You have a secret that if discovered will cause you to be sentence to death. It can be related to another flaw you have.
You have a secret that if discovered will cause you exile or imprisonment, or maybe punished with imprisonment. It can be related to another flaw you have.
You have a secret that if discovered will cause you much embarrassment and pain. It can be related to another flaw you have.

You feel that you have a responsibility towards towards large group (e.g. country). This is an internal feeling, one you have placed upon yourself. You will never betray, harm or mislead those to whom you have a Sense of Duty.

You feel that you have a responsibility towards towards large group or organization (e.g. town or city). This is an internal feeling, one you have placed upon yourself. You will never betray, harm or mislead those to whom you have a Sense of Duty.

You feel that you have a responsibility towards a close friend or small group. This is an internal feeling, one you have placed upon yourself. You will never betray, harm or mislead those to whom you have a Sense of Duty.
You have to sleep at least 8h per night, if you are somehow awakened before the 8 hours you will be at -5 to all actions per each hour before 8 you were awoken.
You are slow in combat. Your moves are obvious and awkward. You receive a penalty of -5 to your OB, DB and your initiative rolls
Your are slower than normal. Your Base movement rate is reduced by 25%
Your suffer spasm attacks; whenever you roll an unmodified 66 you experience a spasm, it lasts for 1d100 turns. You loose 1d10 hit points
You shave a speech impediment that makes it difficult for you to speak. Any skills that require speech will suffer a special -50 penalty

You are superstitious, often reading omens into anything you encounter. You always observe the various good luck and bad luck practices of your culture. Your mood and morale are often affected by these omens
susbtract your status rank from your perception rolls
Whenever you roll a 01 the outcome is the worst event possible, but cannot be instant death.
when you engage in an intrigue you must use intimidate first, you also have -30 to seducing or convincing attempts

Your legs are significantly weaker than a typical member of your race. Cannot walk more than 5 hours without resting at least 2 hrs. If walk more than 5 hrs, 25% chance that both legs will develop cramps. Legs will stay cramped for 2d10 hrs rendering completely useless during that time

Unable to lie. Everybody can tell when you are lying. Deception costs double, you cannot refuse to tell the truth. This is not a vow to always tell the truth, you just suck at lying. If on a situation were you prefer to shush you must make a resistance will very hard maneuver to be able to
Whenever you fail a maneuver (no matter what it is) you receive an “A” unbalance critical
You have a unique look, people always stare at you and notices it. you cannot conceal it, you suffer a -20 to appearance and people react extremely to it.

You have a unique look, people always stare at you and notices it, you can conceal it, whether by using a cloak, some product or special clothing. If people see it they will have a negative reaction to it, you suffer a -10 to appearance
You have a unique look, people always stare at you and notices it. you can conceal it, whether by using a cloak, some product or special clothing.
You have bad luck, all your fumble and negative ranges are increased by 1

Have taken a vow to do(or avoid) something. This vow has been sealed by some sort of ritual that left a mark on your soul. Follow your vow or risk loosing XP. This determines who you are & can be use against you (Always accept challenges, fight with lesser weapon than your foe, etc.)

Have taken a vow to do (or avoid) something. This vow has been sealed by some sort of ritual that left a mark on your soul. Follow your vow or risk loosing XP. May or may not bother you occasionally (Giving 10% of your money to church, showing respect to all your elderly, etc.)

Have taken a vow to do (or avoid) something. This vow has been sealed by some sort of ritual that left a mark on your soul. Follow your vow or risk loosing XP. This restraines your actions in a way, most people notice it after a while. (Never using edged weapons, never speaking, etc)

Have taken a vow to do (or avoid) something. This vow has been sealed by some sort of ritual that left a mark on your soul. Follow your vow or risk loosing XP. Must be part of your way of life, but not ban you from acting fairly normal (Chastity, eating no meat, etc.)
You are a wimp, you suffer a penalty of -20 to all the athletic skills, a -2 to your St bonus and you can travel 2 hours less than usual.
Genera 2 puntos adicionales de Caos por cada dado base que tire al usar artefactos, independientemente del resultado. No afecta dados de tentación ni Chaos Dice.
Todos los umbrales de Caos se desplazan −100 puntos (Marcado en 101, Corrupto en 401, etc.). Inverso de Iron Threshold.
La dificultad de RR Will para resistir la tentación del artefacto aumenta en +10, acumulándose con todos los modificadores normales de la fórmula.
Marcas físicas menores del Caos desde el inicio de la campaña aunque el track esté en 0. Recibe el −10 social de Marcado desde el primer día. Narrativamente, algo ocurrió en su infancia.
Presencia de artefactos activos de Potencia 3+ a menos de 10 metros produce migrañas. −10 a todas las tiradas de concentración y Perception mientras estén en rango. No puede ignorarlo.
Al cruzar un umbral de Caos, tira dos veces en la tabla de efectos de cruce y sufre ambos resultados.

Atadura psicológica severa a la villa de origen. Cada día más allá de un día de camino debe superar una tirada de RR Will a dificultad moderada. Si falla, −5 a todas las tiradas de RR Will y Social hasta que descanse en el radio o supere la tirada al día siguiente.

Marca física menor visible reconocida como señal del Caos aunque el track no esté en umbral Marcado. Recibe el −10 social en todas las villas. Personajes con Suffix Recognition lo identifican automáticamente como potencial -khrav.
No puede percibir pylons ni su estado. Al entrar en área sin protección de pylon activo, tarda 1d6 rondas adicionales en percibir el cambio de ambiente.
El rango de fallo catastrófico de cualquier artefacto que use se amplía en 3 puntos (si fallaba en 01–05, ahora falla en 01–08). El GM define fallo catastrófico por artefacto.

Sueños recurrentes del planeta destruido desde el inicio de campaña, incluso con Caos en 0. No impide el descanso completo, pero una vez por semana el GM puede introducir una visión que el personaje no puede ignorar narrativamente.

Incapacidad congénita para percibir o interactuar con energía del Orden. No puede tomar Order Sensitivity ni talentos relacionados. Los efectos de recuperación de Caos mediante Orden menor se reducen a la mitad.

El personaje tiene aversión severa al lago caótico. Cada vez que deba entrar al agua o navegar en barca, debe superar una tirada de RR Will a dificultad moderada. Si falla, sufre −15 a todas las tiradas durante el tiempo que pase en o sobre el agua.

Una categoría específica de criaturas del Caos produce en el personaje una fascinación compulsiva. Al encontrar esa criatura, debe superar una tirada de RR Will para no intentar observarla en vez de reaccionar. El GM elige la criatura en creación de personaje.

El personaje no logra interpretar los sonidos de la selva como señales de peligro. −20 a todas las tiradas de Perception pasiva en exteriores. Las criaturas que se aproximen en entorno natural nunca activarán su alerta automática.

El personaje absorbe Caos ambiental a mayor velocidad que el resto. En zonas de Caos elevado (umbral Resonante o superior en el entorno), acumula 2 puntos de Caos adicionales por hora de estancia, independientemente de si usa artefactos.

El personaje ha pasado tanto tiempo bajo la protección de pylons que el exterior le afecta más rápido. Fuera del radio de protección de cualquier pylon, todos sus umbrales de Caos se reducen en 50 puntos adicionales.
